Dashboard.subtitle: Monitor and manage your internal staging environments.
Dashboard.registerDescription: Map a domain to an internal container and optionally provision a dedicated database.
Dashboard.provisionDbDescription: Create a dedicated PostgreSQL database and user for this project.
Dashboard.noServices: No services registered yet. Deploy your first one above.
Dashboard.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to decommission {domain}? This will remove the Caddy route and, if applicable, PERMANENTLY drop the associated database.
Dashboard.credentialsDescription: Save these now. For security, they won't be shown again.
